_doc: L3 activation-surface classification. Generated + hand-audited. Each model-load site (torch.load/pickle.load(s)/joblib.load/load_state_dict/reload_model()) MUST have an entry. A NEW un-annotated site reds CI (scripts/ci/activation_surface_enumerator.py). class: gated|producer|offline|unmounted|infra. `gated` = production-reachable model activation; each MUST route through the L3 proof membrane (verify_and_load) once built; until then the membrane default is #509's unconditional raise. This file classifies; it does not enable anything.
